name: Channel Landing
description: The default landing surface for a community. A home-style NavigationBar sits at the top, a horizontal ChannelRail surfaces the user's joined channels under it, the body scrolls a Feed of authored posts, and a single FAB anchors the canonical commit (compose a new post). This is the most common 'opens the app' screen.

top.note: home variant — left-aligned title, trailing icon actions.

items.title: Tokens build is clean
items.body: Shipped the new tokens build today — light/dark parity is finally clean.

items.title: Second pair of eyes
items.body: Looking for a second pair of eyes on the navigation-bar search variant.

body.note: Feed sits directly under the ChannelRail. ChannelRail can also live inside `top` as an attached strip; this recipe keeps the rail in body to allow the home bar to remain pure title + actions.

fab.note: The single canonical commit for this surface. Tapping opens a Dialog or a new screen for composing a post — not represented in this recipe.

rules: Only one FAB. If the variation needs a destructive primary action, move it into a Dialog confirmation triggered from a row menu, not into a second FAB.
Do not stack a second NavigationBar inside body. Section headers belong inside the Feed row chrome, not as a bar.
Feed and ChannelList are not interchangeable here — Feed is authored content; ChannelList is a directory.
